scripts.build: npm run build -w @markdv/core && npm run build -w @luty81/markdv && npm run build -w @markdv/web
scripts.build:cli: npm run build -w @markdv/core && npm run build -w @luty81/markdv
scripts.build:web: npm run build -w @markdv/core && npm run build -w @markdv/web
scripts.test: prettier --check . && npm run build:core && npm test -w @luty81/markdv
